board_csa_architect.notes: Profile format standardization directly reduces prompt injection risk. validate() gate before inference is a strong control.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: RLS on agent_profile_history + append-only constraint + service-role-only INSERT satisfies data integrity requirements.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: AgentProfileParser.hydrate() producing deterministic prompts is architecturally sound. SYSTEM CONSTRAINTS block prevents LLM instruction override.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: ALTER TABLE IF NOT EXISTS is safe to re-run. M effort is accurate. TDD mandate satisfied by unit test requirement at >=90% coverage.
